title: Monte Guide
stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Mantine, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Realtime), Mapbox, OpenAI GPT-4o
summary: Интерактивный гид по Черногории с 1 250+ карточками услуг в 25+ категориях и охватом 15+ городов. Полная мультиязычность с AI-переводами, система отзывов, кабинет провайдера, премиум-подписки, букинг, чат с авто-переводом и ridesharing-сервис MonteCar.
detailsHtml:
Работает как веб-приложение, PWA и Telegram Mini App.

Проект написан на Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript с Mantine и Tailwind CSS, база данных — Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime), карты — Mapbox, AI-ассистент — OpenAI GPT-4o с web search.

Кодовая база включает 120+ API-эндпоинтов, 426+ E2E-тестов (Playwright), 45 accessibility-тестов и production-роадмап до Q1 2027.

en.title: Monte Guide
en.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Mantine, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Realtime), Mapbox, OpenAI GPT-4o
en.summary: An interactive guide to Montenegro with 1,250+ service cards in 25+ categories covering 15+ cities. Full multilingual support with AI translations, review system, provider dashboard, premium subscriptions, booking, chat with auto-translation, and the MonteCar ridesharing service.
en.detailsHtml:
Works as a web application, PWA, and Telegram Mini App.

The project is built with Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript using Mantine and Tailwind CSS; the database is Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime), maps are Mapbox, AI assistant is OpenAI GPT-4o with web search.

The codebase includes 120+ API endpoints, 426+ E2E tests (Playwright), 45 accessibility tests, and a production roadmap until Q1 2027.

de.title: Monte Guide
de.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Mantine, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Realtime), Mapbox, OpenAI GPT-4o
de.summary: Interaktiver Reiseführer für Montenegro mit über 1.250 Dienstleistungskarten in mehr als 25 Kategorien und Abdeckung von über 15 Städten. Vollständige Mehrsprachigkeit mit KI-Übersetzungen, Bewertungssystem, Anbieter-Dashboard, Premium-Abonnements, Buchung, Chat mit Auto-Übersetzung und MonteCar Ridesharing-Service.
de.detailsHtml:
Funktioniert als Webanwendung, PWA und Telegram Mini App.

Das Projekt ist geschrieben mit Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript unter Verwendung von Mantine und Tailwind CSS, die Datenbank ist Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime), Karten von Mapbox, KI-Assistent OpenAI GPT-4o mit Websuche.

Der Code umfasst über 120 API-Endpunkte, mehr als 426 E2E-Tests (Playwright), 45 Accessibility-Tests und einen Produktions-Roadmap bis Q1 2027.

me.title: Monte Guide
me.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Mantine, Tailwind CSS, Supabase (PostgreSQL, RLS, Realtime), Mapbox, OpenAI GPT-4o
me.summary: Interaktivni vodič kroz Crnu Goru sa preko 1.250 kartica usluga u više od 25 kategorija i pokrivenošću preko 15 gradova. Potpuna višejezičnost sa AI prevodima, sistemom ocenjivanja, korisničkim nalogom za provajdere, premium pretplatama, rezervacijama, četom sa automatskim prevodom i MonteCar ridesharing servisom.
me.detailsHtml:
Radi kao web aplikacija, PWA i Telegram Mini App.

Projekat je napisan u Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript korišćenjem Mantine i Tailwind CSS, baza podataka je Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Realtime), mape su preko Mapboxa, AI asistent je OpenAI GPT-4o sa web pretragom.

Izvorni kod sadrži preko 120 API endpointa, 426+ E2E testova (Playwright), 45 testova pristupačnosti i produkcioni roadmap do prvog kvartala 2027.
